title: Network Create: Add --ignore flag to support idempotent script
body:
Add --ignore flag to the command line
NetworkCreate interface - add NetworkCreateOptions parameter Remote API - wrap the Network struct to allow passing additional fields, e.g. ignore Kube - use the IgnoreIfExists flag when creating the default network instead of handling the failure Add e2e tests

Signed-off-by: Ygal Blum <ygal.blum@gmail.com>

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
Yes

```release-note
Network Create: Add --ignore flag to instruct Podman to not fail when trying to create an already existing Network.
```

comments.body: I needed to create a new structure for the remote APIs. Not sure that I chose the right place for it: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/16773/files#diff-67310313867eb5378a8f260e7f92ac12683a604b43154ee63c8cd1162a41d889R91

> You also need to update the podman-network-create man page to include the new option.

Done
@Luap99 I've fixed the comments. In addition, can you please restart the failed, test? It doesn't look like it has anything to do with this change.
@mheon can you please take a look?
